description: Initialize wiki, database, daemon, and dependencies.
Assess three-layer macro/sector/stock regime state.
Calculate IBD-method distribution day count.
Evaluate circuit breaker status (VIX, daily moves, yield curve).
Calculate advance/decline, new highs/lows, and breadth score.
Calculate momentum spread velocity across sectors.
Write current regime state to wiki for historical memory.
Design or refine trading rules with quantitative justification.
Score a trade signal against current rules, checklist, and sizing.
Generate prioritized action list for current market conditions.
Lint, update, and cross-reference the trading knowledge base.
Write daemon-executable YAML trading rule files.
Calculate rolling Sharpe, EV by setup type, and drawdown stats.
Update signal source weighting and conviction tier thresholds.
Execute full pre-trade pipeline: intake, checklist, size, and execute.
Manage trailing stops, pyramid entries, and partial exits.
Flag stale positions past freshness window for thesis revalidation.
View and act on pending Tier B confirmation orders.
Rank multiple pending signals by edge, fit, and regime.
Analyze causal attribution for a closed trade.
Evaluate open positions for thesis integrity before stops are hit.
Map causal contagion across open positions after a significant loss.
Generate live portfolio telemetry dashboard with risk and opportunity.
Automated morning workflow: regime → scan → evaluate → prioritize → deploy.
Run pre-market scanner using existing regime.
Run desk agents (Nadia/Tara/Frank/Sage) on today's watchlist.
Evaluate today's existing watchlist candidates.
Deploy from today's existing evaluations.
Summarize performance and extract cross-trade patterns.
Recalculate expected value per setup type from the quant layer.
Extract regime insights from accumulated snapshots and trade outcomes.
Find macro patterns across batches of recent post-mortems.
Conduct comprehensive system health and allocation review.
Check wiki health: identify contradictions, stale pages, and orphans.
